## Relationships (Application-Layer FKs)

**EMPLOYEE_CHANGES** -> EMPLOYEE_MSTR (EMPLOYEE -> EMPLOYEE)

**EMPLOYEE_IMAGE_MATCH** -> EMPLOYEE_MSTR (EMPLOYEE_NUMBER -> EMPLOYEE)

**EMPLOYEE_MSTR** -> ACCTG_BRANCH (BRANCH -> BRANCH_ID); BALANCING_GROUP (PR_BALANCE_GROUP -> BAL_GROUP); DEPARTMENTS (DEPT_EMPLOYEE -> DEPT_ID); LUNCH_SHIFT (SHIFT -> SHIFT); PAYROLL_EMP_STAT (PR_EMPL_STATUS -> CODE); PAYROLL_PAY (PAY_GROUP -> PAY_GROUP)

**EMPLOYEE_MSTR_ADDL** -> EMPLOYEE_MSTR (EMPLOYEE -> EMPLOYEE)

**EMPLOYEE_MSTR_W2** -> BALANCING_GROUP (PR_BALANCE_GROUP -> BAL_GROUP); DEPARTMENTS (DEPT_EMPLOYEE -> DEPT_ID); EMPLOYEE_MSTR (EMPLOYEE -> EMPLOYEE); LUNCH_SHIFT (SHIFT -> SHIFT); PAYROLL_EMP_STAT (PR_EMPL_STATUS -> CODE); PAYROLL_PAY (PAY_GROUP -> PAY_GROUP)

**EMPLOYEE_SFDC** -> EMPLOYEE_MSTR (EMPLOYEE -> EMPLOYEE)

**EMPLOYEE_SHIFT** -> BALANCING_GROUP (F_GROUP -> BAL_GROUP); DEPARTMENTS (DEPT -> DEPT_ID); EMPLOYEE_MSTR (EMPLOYEE -> EMPLOYEE); LUNCH_SHIFT (SHIFT -> SHIFT)
